pub struct Endpoint<'r, const ROLE: u8, K, Mint = crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfig> where K: carrier::SessionKitFamily + 'r, Mint: MintConfigMarker, {
pub struct RouteBranch<'e, 'r, const ROLE: u8, K, Mint = crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfig> where K: carrier::SessionKitFamily + 'r, Mint: MintConfigMarker, {
pub fn flow<'e, M>( &'e mut self, ) -> SendResult< flow::Flow<'e, 'r, ROLE, M, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint>, > where M: crate::global::MessageSpec + crate::global::SendableLabel, 'cfg: 'r, {
pub fn recv<'e, M>(&'e mut self) -> impl core::future::Future<Output = RecvResult<<<M as crate::global::MessageSpec>::Payload as crate::transport::wire::WirePayload>::Decoded<'e>>> + 'e where M: crate::global::MessageSpec + 'e, M::Payload: crate::transport::wire::WirePayload, {
pub fn offer<'e>( &'e mut self, ) -> impl core::future::Future<Output = RecvResult<RouteBranch<'e, 'r, ROLE, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint>>> + 'e {
pub fn label(&self) -> u8 {
pub fn decode<M>(self) -> impl core::future::Future<Output = RecvResult<<<M as crate::global::MessageSpec>::Payload as crate::transport::wire::WirePayload>::Decoded<'e>>> where M: crate::global::MessageSpec, M::Payload: crate::transport::wire::WirePayload, {
pub enum SendError {
pub enum RecvError {
pub type SendResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, SendError>;
pub type RecvResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, RecvError>;
